question: List collection subset id, name and number of collections in each subset.
sql: SELECT Collection_Subsets.Collection_Subset_ID, Collection_Subsets.Collection_Subset_Name, COUNT(Collections.Collection_ID) AS number_of_collections FROM Collection_Subsets LEFT JOIN Collections ON Collection_Subsets.Collection_Subset_ID = Collections.Parent_Collection_ID GROUP BY Collection_Subsets.Collection_Subset_ID, Collection_Subsets.Collection_Subset_Name

back_translation.intent: 统计每个集合子集下的集合数量

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致。原始问题要求列出每个集合子集的ID、名称及其中的集合数量，SQL描述中的意图、分组字段（按子集ID和名称）、聚合函数（统计集合数量）均准确对应。
